name: RagingEnby's AIO Source
subtitle: [6/16/26 16:00] Every single repo I could find, united.
description: I got really sick and tired of typing in a billion different repos. So this one repo scrapes 200-300 AltSources and combines them into one, beautiful, united repository.

apps.name: Apollo for Reddit - GLASS
apps.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn build with Liquid Glass patch
apps.localizedDescription:
Apollo-Reborn is the community-maintained Apollo sideload build powered by the Apollo-Reborn tweak.

It restores custom API support, media fixes, uploads, inline media, translation, saved categories, Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets, Liquid Glass support on iOS 26+, and the rest of the project’s ongoing fixes and enhancements.

These sources are intended for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Apollo-Reborn is not compatible with AltStore PAL.

Choose the source variant that matches how you sideload:

• Standard: full app bundle with Apollo’s working extensions plus Apollo-Reborn widgets
• No Extensions: strips app extensions, including widgets, to reduce App ID usage on free Apple IDs
• GLASS: adds the Liquid Glass iOS 26 patch and bundled Liquid Glass icon catalog
• No Extensions + GLASS: combines both options

This project is not affiliated with Apollo or Christian Selig.

versions.localizedDescription: Liquid Glass build. > [!NOTE] > Stay tuned for our next upcoming release, bringing *even more* new features like signing in without API keys, Picture-in-Picture (PiP), build your own theme, Img Chest image uploads, Apple on-device translations, redesigned subreddit sidebar, community highlights, and more! Features - New Apollo Reborn Widgets — nine Home Screen, Lock Screen, and StandBy widgets (Showerthoughts, Jokes, Post, Feed, Photo, Shortcuts, Apollo Actions, Calendar, and Headline) (#406: @jordanearle) - To configure widgets: copy the one-time setup code from Settings > Apollo Reborn > Copy Widget Setup Code. Then, long-press any widget → Edit Widget → paste into Setup Code. - Requires iOS 17 or later. Widgets do not work on iOS 26 if sideloading with Sideloadly - please use an alternative instead. The NOEXTENSIONS IPA variant does not include widgets. - Add a Universal OAuth Sign-In toggle in Settings > Apollo Reborn (on by default) to fall back to Apollo's native sign-in if the in-app login causes trouble (#432: @JeffreyCA) - All IPAs released from now on have dystopia and redreader URL schemes already registered so no need to manually edit Info.plist anymore - Add a manual sign-in fallback for older iOS versions that can't load Reddit's login page, using an external browser and an Apollo Reborn userscript to paste a sign-in code back into Apollo (#430: @DeltAndy123; sign-in keyboard improvements by @Alstruit) - Add a Text Post Thumbnails toggle in Settings > Apollo Reborn > Media (on by default) — text posts that embed an image now show a thumbnail with a Text Post badge, and tapping it opens the image in the media viewer instead of the thread (#426: @icpryde) - Add Hide Mod Subreddits to remove moderated subreddits you can't leave from the Subreddits list — tap Edit, then the blue button to hide a subreddit and the green button to bring it back (#424: @icpryde) - Show moderator reports as native inline sections in the post and comment action menu (#412: @JeffreyCA) - Make the banned-profile overlay dismissable (#409: @JeffreyCA) - Combine cache-clearing options into one Clear Tweak Caches button under a renamed Data section (#409: @JeffreyCA) Fixes - Show the author avatar and subreddit icon in Share as Image post exports, so the image matches what you see in the app (#438: @icpryde) - Fix several link card glitches in feeds — cards whose text overflowed into the post below, Bluesky posts losing their paragraph breaks, compact cards stuck at full height, and blank image areas on links whose thumbnail isn't ready yet (#427: @icpryde) - Fix gallery GIFs getting stuck on a loading spinner when swiping between items in an album (#404: @JeffreyCA) - Fix comment and post text showing a literal ​ or an extra blank line at the end (#405: @JeffreyCA) - Fix comment scrolling freezing in threads that contain a link to removed media, such as a deleted v.redd.it video (#395: @JeffreyCA) - Fix spurious "error :(" overlay appearing over videos that play fine but whose preview image fails to load (#409: @JeffreyCA) - Fix Live Activities not updating on secret-protected self-hosted notification backends (#411: @nickclyde) - Fix an installation conflict when upgrading from some older versions (#401: @Alstruit) - Bundle libFLEX inside the app so rootless jailbreak users can keep the standalone libFLEX package installed without it conflicting with Apollo Reborn (#437: @iCrazeiOS)

Liquid Glass build.

> [!NOTE]
> We're aware of reports that Reddit has started revoking some users' API keys. Please see our new updated instructions (https://github.com/Apollo-Reborn/Apollo-Reborn#dont-have-an-api-key) for workarounds.
>
> AltStore, SideStore, Feather sources can be found at https://apolloreborn.app/#download
- Fix a crash when sharing a post to Messages or Mail from the share sheet — the system compose controller was misidentified as an Apollo composer, leaving GIF-toolbar injection timers that dereferenced the dismissed share UI and crashed (#378: @nickclyde)
- Fix Reddit login on iOS 15 by automatically falling back to Old Reddit, and add an Old Reddit button to the auth view for users who need to switch manually (#377: @DeltAndy123)
- Fix video controls overlay rendering, including the AirPlay button getting clipped or misaligned (#383: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix flair alignment so post and user flairs no longer sit too low or clip their text (#389: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix Color Flairs reverting to grey or the wrong shade after returning to Apollo from the background (#391: @icpryde)

Liquid Glass build. Features - Support any custom redirect URI for the Reddit API without patching the app's Info.plist, so custom URI schemes authenticate without the "address is invalid" error (also removes the need for LiveContainer users to patch manually) (#368: @DeltAndy123) - Add Show Deleted Comments option in *Settings > Apollo Reborn Options > General to restore deleted or removed comments inline from archived copies when available (#300: @nunoo) - Add a Color Flairs option in Settings > Apollo Reborn Options > General to color post and user flairs using Reddit's flair colors (#360: @icpryde) - Add GLASS Icons and No Extensions + GLASS Icons distribution variants that bundle the Liquid Glass icon catalog without opting into the iOS 26 UI runtime (#317: @nackerr) - Add new Glitched (@bajader) and Modern / Modern Alt (@paulo1manso) Liquid Glass app icons (#353: @bajader, @paulo1manso) - Restore logged-in accounts when restoring a settings backup, so reinstalling no longer requires re-authenticating each Reddit account (#331: @nickclyde) - Add a Subreddit List Enhancements toggle in Settings > Apollo Reborn Options > Subreddits to fall back to Apollo's native list, working around misaligned rows and a broken index scrubber on some devices (#355: @JeffreyCA) - Render comments with two or more link previews as compact cards instead of stacking full hero cards (#344: @icpryde) - Show feed thumbnails for text posts that embed images but produce no native thumbnail, in both Large and Compact modes (#351: @icpryde) - Fade and disable the comment image/GIF buttons when a subreddit doesn't allow that media type, instead of failing only at submit time (#356: @icpryde) - Add a separate Autoplay Inline GIFs setting in Settings > Apollo Reborn Options > Media to control inline GIF autoplay independently of Apollo's native Autoplay GIFs/Videos setting (#365: @JeffreyCA) - Ship an Apollo-Reborn userscript and an "Open in Apollo" Shortcut recipe as app-independent ways to open Reddit links in Apollo from any browser, handy for the no-extensions variant (#307: @nickclyde) Fixes - Fix the bundled "Open in Apollo" Safari extension, which stopped opening links on sideloaded builds — its default "Automatic" mode redirected through openinapollo.com, whose auto-open only works for the App Store build. It now redirects straight to apollo:// and handles /s/ share links (#307: @nickclyde) - Fix the bundled "Open in Apollo" share-sheet action so it opens Reddit links in Apollo from any browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Brave…), not just Safari, replacing a deprecated call that iOS 18+ refused to run. On iOS 26 the extension only launches if your installer sets the appex main-binary flag — AltStore/SideStore do, Sideloadly/Feather don't, where the Shortcut remains a signer-independent fallback (#307: @nickclyde) - Fix Recently Read showing no posts after a Reddit API change (#341: @JeffreyCA) - Fix inline Reddit GIFs in comments staying frozen instead of autoplaying until collapsed/expanded or refreshed (#349: @icpryde) - Fix inline GIFs not autoplaying on cellular when Autoplay GIFs/Videos is set to Always (#347: @JeffreyCA) - Fix the inline video play button missing on post-body Reddit videos and a clipped AirPlay icon (#350: @icpryde) - Fix laggy subreddit header scrolling and incorrect handling on non-subreddit feeds (#339: @JeffreyCA) - Fix Share as Image not opening under the iOS 26 native action menu (#335: @icpryde) - Fix the Rich Link Previews – Body** setting having no effect and following the Comments setting instead (#329: @nickclyde) - Fix a crash in the banned-profile hook (#326: @JeffreyCA) - Fix a crash when navigating into comments from a dangling host pointer in inline image cleanup (#362: @JeffreyCA) Screenshots

#360 · Color Flairs
#344 · Compact multi-link comments
#355 · Subreddit List Enhancements

#356 · Fade comment image/GIF buttons
#351 · Feed thumbnails for text posts
#349 · Inline Reddit GIFs autoplay

#350 · Inline video play button
#353 · New "Glitched" Liquid Glass icon
#335 · Share as Image fix
> [!NOTE] > AltStore, SideStore, Feather sources can be found at https://apolloreborn.app/#download

apps.name: Hot Tub
apps.subtitle: Porn Without the Pop-Ups.
apps.localizedDescription:
Hot Tub is an elegant, native porn app. Thoughtfully designed, ethically made, and free to use.

✨ Key Features

📱 iOS native
The first porn app on iOS

👤 No account needed
Just install and start watching

🎬 Tabbed browsing
Open multiple videos like browser tabs

❤️ Favorites
Save videos you love

📺 Watch history
Track what you've watched

🔐 Private & secure
Privacy-first: anonymous analytics, never linked to your account. Optional sharing is off by default. Not sold to advertisers.

🔒 Face/Touch ID
Lock the app with biometric security

🔊 Speaker warnings
Get notified when connected to Bluetooth speakers

🎛️ Filters & blocks
Hide performers, block keywords, and more

🔎 Advanced search
Find exactly what you want

🌐 Multi-network
Access multiple video sources

🚫 Minimal interruptions
Clean experience without intrusive ads

🌈 LGBTQ+ Friendly
Inclusive content preferences

🎨 Customizable
Tons of options to customize your experience

🔌 Open API
Create and host your own sources


Why Hot Tub?
Because porn websites are frustrating.

🌀 Redirect hell.
🤖 Data brokers stalking your clicks.
🎯 Aggressive pop-ups.
📱 Mobile sites that barely work.

Sound familiar?

We wanted something better. So we built Hot Tub: a sleek, native iOS app that's clean, private, and easy to use.

Just you, your queue, and the content you actually want to see.

🛠 What Makes Hot Tub Special?
🛋 Built for Comfort.
Swipe between videos, open multiple tabs, intuitive gestures that just feels right.

🔒 Lock It Down.
Your privacy is our priority. With a built in privacy screen, Face/Touch ID, and customizable controls, Hot Tub keeps things private when it matters most.

✨ Advanced Search (Hot Tub Pro — Subscribers Only).
Looking for something specific? With Hot Tub Pro, unlock advanced search, filtering, and categories across multiple networks — because sometimes you really know what you're in the mood for.

🔊 Output device notifications
Get notifications when you're accidentally connected to that bluetooth speaker... No more embarrassing moments.

📱 Designed for iOS 15-18.
Hot Tub is a fully native iOS app — no hacks, no shortcuts, no sketchy installs. Just smooth, native performance that works exactly how you'd expect.

"Why not just use [Pornsite Name]?
Let's be real: Websites kinda suck.

They're clunky, cluttered, and constantly trying to sell you junk you don't need.
We've all been there:

👀 You're browsing.
👆 You're about to click.
💥 BAM — the page moves.
🔄 You're stuck in pop-up hell! An endless loop of fake giveaways and sketchy redirects. (Sorry, no, you didn't actually win a free tablet.)

With Hot Tub, you get a clean, focused experience.
No sketchy redirects. No intrusive pop-ups. No data harvesting.

Just you, a clean interface, and the content you actually want.

How Is It Free?
Simple. Hot Tub is funded by our community.

We don't sell your data. Privacy-first: limited telemetry and anonymous analytics, not tied to your identity; opt out in settings where available.
Hot Tub stays free thanks to:

💙 Supporters
🌟 Hot Tub Pro Members (who unlock extra features)
🎁 Donations from people like you.

We believe porn should feel good — not shady.
Clean experience. Respectful monetization. Just better.

Take a Dip.
✅ Browse popular, categories, or search.
✅ Tap videos to open them in new tabs.
✅ Swipe between your open videos, save your favorites.
✅ Close the app, and lock it down.

Clean experience.
No nonsense.
Just Hot Tub — your private, cozy corner of the internet.

The water is warm. Download Hot Tub and take a dip.
Your new favorite app is waiting.

apps.name: Delta
apps.subtitle: Classic games in your pocket.
apps.localizedDescription:
The next consoles for Delta are coming: this beta version of Delta brings support for playing Nintendo DS and Sega Genesis games!

Please report any issues you find to support@altstore.io. Thanks!

versions.localizedDescription:
NEW

Redesigned Settings
• Reorganizes settings into more easily navigable hierarchy
• Icons help differentiate top-level settings
• Access all settings options more quickly and intuitively

Epilogue GB/SN Operator Support (thanks Epilogue!)
• Connect game cartridges directly to your iPhone/iPad and play them natively
• Reads and writes save files to cartridge
• Supports GBC/GBA and SNES games (respectively)
• Blowing into cartridges optional

Cheats
• Fully redesigned cheats screen for Liquid Glass
• Choose icons from a wide selection for added personalization

IMPROVED
• Removed “Import from iTunes” game import option
• Changed “Open Games in New Window” setting to be off by default

FIXED
• Fixed SNES audio crackling
• Fixed NES games occasionally opening to a black screen

NEW

Recents & Favorites
• New "Recently Played" and "Favorites" pages in Game Library
• See all your recent games in the order you last played them
• Add games to "Favorites" via long-press for easy access

Redesigned Pause Menu
• Fully redesigned & animated pause menu with Liquid Glass on iOS 26
• Change Fast Forward speed per-game by long-pressing Fast Forward button

RetroAchievements
• View current game progress when launching game (e.g. number of unlocked achievements)
• View full achievement descriptions by tapping "Achievement Unlocked" banners
• Redesigned banners with more information & Liquid Glass design (iOS 26+)

IMPROVED
• Redesigned Game Library page control with icons (e.g. game systems)
• Updated “What’s New” screen to showcase Delta 2.0 features

FIXED
• Fixed crash when enabling invalid Genesis cheats
• Fixed incorrectly parsing some Genesis cheats
• Fixed incorrect Settings navigation bar insets on iOS 18

NEW

RetroAchievements (Experimental Feature)
• Log in with RetroAchievements to track achievements
• Supports Hardcore mode (Optional)
• Supports NES, SNES, and N64 games

IMPROVED

• Added "Close" button to What's New screen
• Changed "Respect Silent Mode" default to OFF
• New "Follow Us" footer at bottom of Settings screen
• Stays connected online up to 30 seconds when entering background

FIXED

• Fixed white screen after (un-)locking device while AirPlaying DS games
• Fixed ignoring keyboard inputs for non-DS systems
• Fixed not showing external game controller skin when returning from background
• Fixed missing label for no chosen controller skin
• Fixed not asking user to import BIOS before inserting GBA game
• Fixed not disabling touch screen controller when game controller is connected

NEW

“What's New” Screen
• Lists new features in latest Delta update

Controller Case Support
• Adjust position of pause menu via controller skins
• Allows using pause menu with cases such as Gamebaby and PlayCase
• Supports vertical and horizontal insets

IMPROVED

Online Multiplayer
• Fetches known WFC servers dynamically
• Asks user to choose WFC server when first connecting online
• “Reset WFC Configuration” button to reset WFC-related settings

FIXED
• Fixed using analog sticks as discrete inputs for controllers with poor calibration (Thanks Ian Clawson!)
• Fixed not disabling active Fast Forward when connecting online
• Fixed showing all save states as incompatible for non-DS systems
• Fixed not showing Reset button when choosing per-game External Controller or AirPlay skins
• Fixed crash when viewing save states for unsupported system
• Fixed Hold Button description layout after orientation change

NEW

Game Controller Skins
• Choose skin to use when controller is connected
• Customize system-wide or per-game

Game Settings
• New context-menu option to configure per-game settings
• Disable OpenGL ES 3.0 for specific games (N64)

IMPROVED

Online Multiplayer (DS)
• Simplified setup process that doesn't require configuring DNS
• Choose from known WFC servers in Delta's settings
• Provide custom DNS for other WFC servers

Screenshots
• Option always visible in pause menu
• Take screenshots with game controllers or skins
• Saves to new "Delta Screenshots" album

FIXED
• Fixed no audio for game previews in silent mode
• Fixed no "Reset" button when choosing landscape skin

NEW
• “Resume” button to easily resume games
• Additional "Button Pack" icons designed by Louie Mantia

IMPROVED
• Added button to view Online Multiplayer instructions
• Enable/disable Online Multiplayer via Experimental Features

FIXED
• Fixed incorrect default mapping for iPad GBC landscape skin

This beta fixes N64 games crashing on launch.

PREVIOUS BETA

Online Multiplayer
• Play Nintendo DS games online with friends!
• Connect via 3rd-party Nintendo WFC servers (e.g. Kaeru)

Nintendo 64
• New OpenGL ES 3 renderer fixes many common graphical issues
• Optionally switch back to OpenGL ES 2 via Experimental Features
• Custom resolutions
• Custom texture packs

Misc.
• Adds dark + tinted variants of primary app icon
• Fixed misleading “file does not exist” Delta Sync error
• [iPad] Fixed qutting all games when using multiple scenes

NEW

Online Multiplayer
• Play Nintendo DS games online with friends!
• Connect via 3rd-party Nintendo WFC servers (e.g. Kaeru)

Nintendo 64
• New OpenGL ES 3 renderer fixes many common graphical issues
• Optionally switch back to OpenGL ES 2 via Experimental Features
• Custom resolutions
• Custom texture packs

IMPROVED
• Adds dark + tinted variants of primary app icon

FIXED
• Fixed misleading “file does not exist” Delta Sync error
• [iPad] Fixed qutting all games when using multiple scenes

• Fixed not unlocking Experimental Features
• Fixed misc. visual bugs on iOS 18

• Fixed occasionally dropping DS touch screen inputs
• Fixed crash loading certain skins with fallback traits
• Fixed crash loading certain iPhone skins on iPad
• Fixed app freezing when AirPlaying
• Fixed app freezing when rotating device with certain skins

NEW
• Supports using iPhone skins on iPad
• Updated app icon to new logo

FIXED
• Fixed rare crash when loading DS save states
• Fixed game controllers not working on visionOS and macOS
• Fixed hardware keyboard support on macOS
• Fixed menu button not working on external controllers with remapped menu button
• Fixed delayed inputs on external controllers with remapped menu button
• Fixed DS touch screen not responding after updating to iPad version

NEW

Handoff Support
• Seamlessly switch between iPhone and iPad
• Continues playing exactly where you left off
• Supports Delta on Apple Silicon Macs via Mac App Store

Save States
• View all incompatible screenshots on a separate screen
• Export save states to import into other emulators
• Supports sorting by name

Misc.
• Supports Game Mode on iOS 18+
• "Open New Window" option by long-pressing "Main Menu"/"Close" on pause screen

IMPROVED

Quick Gestures
• Added new gestures for Quick Save/Load
• Quick Save = Double-tap
• Quick Load = Long-press

Controller Skins
• Finalizes iPad controller skin designs
• UI to choose different Split View/Stage Manager skins
• Increased DS screen size for default edge-to-edge iPhone landscape skin

Experimental Features
• UI to choose AirPlay skins
• "Skin Debugging" to toggle "debug mode" for skins

FIXED

iPad
• Fixed not recognizing quick gestures on Split View controller
• Fixed crash when pressing "Reset Controller Skin" button
• Fixed crash opening N64 games in new window with context previews enabled
• Fixed sometimes showing incorrect skin orientation in split view
• Fixed loading wrong game after quitting game in another window
• Fixed potential freeze when opening games in new window

⚠️ This update is incompatible with existing DS save states. Please save normally in-game before updating.

NEW

Multiple Windows
• Supports multiple windows on iPad
• Emulate games from multiple systems simultaneously 
• Open new windows via drag & drop, or by long-pressing game then choosing "Open in New Window"
• Automatically pause games when switching windows (optional)

Updated melonDS core to 0.9.5
• Improves game compatibility & performance
• BIOS files are now optional!
• Supports "inserting" GBA games into DS dual-slot
• Increased fast forward speed to 3x (A15 processor or later)

“Support External Displays” Setting
• Control whether Delta shows games full screen on external displays
• Disable to use multiple windows on external display with Stage Manager

FIXED
• Fixed clipped context menu preview for games
• Fixed exporting save file without file extension
• Fixed interface rotating when playing WarioWare: Twisted!
• [iPad] Fixed not adjusting DS screens for split view keyboard
• [iPad] Fixed hidden save state thumbnails when in compact size class

Quick Gestures
• Hold menu button to perform actions via gestures
• Fast Forward: Swipe left or right
• Hold Button: Tap buttons to hold/release

• Fixed issue where Delta could accidentally overwrite local data with old remote data
• Fixed incorrectly marking some game saves as conflicted during initial sync
• Fixed accidentally signing-out after signing-in to previous Google Drive account

IMPROVED

Delta Sync
• Added detailed logging to help debug issues
• View complete error log via "Export Error Log" option in Settings

Misc.
• Shows AirPlay icon when AirPlaying
• Added "Learn More" links to FAQ thoughout app

FIXED

iPad
• Fixed crash when changing DS emulator core
• Fixed incorrectly indented rows on MelonDS core settings screen
• Fixed not rounding last visible row in MelonDS core settings

⚠️ This beta fixes a critical bug that could cause corrupted save files and save states to be uploaded to Google Drive/Dropbox.

Please update ASAP to ensure you don't lose any data. You can read more about this bug fix in today's Patreon post.

IMPROVED

Delta Sync
• Automatically resolves cheat + controller skin sync conflicts
• Syncs game save hash between devices to prevent redundant uploads
• Displays activity indicator when signing in
• Delays seeding sync database until initial sync
• Uses local modification date when uploading changes
• Signs out from previous service when switching services
• Improved error message when remote storage is out of free space (Dropbox only)

Settings
• Revised UI to use modern "inset grouped" style
• Uses large titles where appropriate

Misc.
• Replaces `UIDocumentBrowserViewController` with `UIDocumentPickerViewController` on iOS 17+
• Skips checksum verification when importing zipped games

FIXED

Delta Sync
• Fixed incorrect mass conflicts when signing out then back in
• Fixed “Harmony.sqlite couldn’t be opened” sync error when there are more than 1000 games
• Fixed “file does not exist” sync error after restoring previous version
• Fixed Delta Sync switch remaining OFF if users cancels "Disable Syncing?" warning alert
• Fixed missing references to remote files when signing out then back in
• Fixed queued syncs sometimes fetching outdated changes
• Fixed accidentally using wrong account when signed-in to multiple services

iPad
• Fixed crash when resolving Delta Sync merge conflicts
• Fixed crash when disabling Delta Sync or switching services

Experimental Features
• Fixed saving screenshots to Photos with .limited authorization
• Fixed saving screenshots to Photos as JPEGs

Misc.
• Fixed accidentally deleting Games directory during sync in rare circumstances
• Fixed crash loading save states on iOS 17
• Fixed displaying system name in dark text when remapping inputs on iOS 17

NEW

AirPlay Support 
• Stream your games to the big screen with AirPlay
• [DS] Optionally AirPlay just top screen for true multi-screen experience

Experimental Features
• New section in Settings for features by third-party contributors
• Features are WIP and should be used at user’s discretion

Initial Experimental Features
• Show Status Bar: View time/WiFi/battery while playing a game (@LitRitt)
• Game Screenshots: Take screenshots from pause menu (@LitRitt)
• In-Game Notifications: Show pop-up alerts when performing certain actions (@LitRitt)
• AirPlay Skins: Customize appearance of games on TV when AirPlaying
• Variable Fast Forward: Change the Fast Forward speed per-system

FIXED
• Fixed translucent controller skins resetting opacity after rotating device
• Fixed incorrect thumbstick size after rotating device

Local Multiplayer (thanks Ian Clawson @ThatClawsonBoy!)
• Play NES, SNES, N64, and Genesis games with friends
• Supports up to 4 players

Improved Non-MFi Controller Support
• New default mappings for single Joy-Cons and Switch NES/SNES controllers
• Uses Logo/Home button as Delta pause button if possible

"Contributors" screen
• See everyone who has contributed to Delta
• View associated Pull Requests for contributed features

PREVIOUS BETA
• “Respect Silent Mode” setting
• Automatically mutes game audio if another app is playing audio
• Browse CheatBase for all known cheats for games (thanks Noah Keck @horn978)

privacy.name: Microphone
privacy.usageDescription: Delta uses your microphone to emulate the Nintendo DS microphone.

privacy.name: LocalNetwork
privacy.usageDescription: Delta uses the local network to communicate with AltServer and enable JIT.

privacy.name: PhotoLibrary
privacy.usageDescription: Allows Delta to use images from your Photo Library as game artwork.

apps.name: Watusi
apps.subtitle: The all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp
apps.localizedDescription:
Watusi is your all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp Messenger.

This is an original version, it has original WhatsApp bundle ID, you need to delete original WhatsApp before installing.

versions.localizedDescription:
This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.21.X
- Fixed Disable Delivery Receipts not working properly

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.20.X
- Fixed the status video auto-split feature
- Fixed the Groups button in the chats list navigation bar sometimes not appearing.
- Fixed long-pressing the Compose button to access the hidden chats list.
- Fixed the Stalky updates list bar button count on iOS 26 Liquid Glass.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.18.X
- Force enable custom chat list filters on companion devices since WhatsApp disabled it in one of their recent updates.
- Fixed a crash on launch caused by the contact spoofing feature when enabled with statuses bar on chats due to a wrong user identifier.
- Fixed statuses bar on the chats list not showing correct contact name and profile picture for some contacts with a wrong identifier.
- Fixed various share sheet actions not working, and updated others to present proper controllers similar to the default WhatsApp actions.
- Fixed status contact groups not deselecting some contacts whose chat session uses a different ID.
- Fixed Hide Frequently Contacted not working in some new chat picker and forward picker.
- Fixed Hide Call Buttons hiding the Cancel button in select messages mode, preventing users from exiting the selection.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.16.X
- Fixed an issue where status contact groups were not properly deselected, preventing selected contacts from being removed.

This update contains the following changes:

- Rewrote the unlimited pinned chats feature so it now works properly and no longer unpins when syncing with a linked device.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.10.X
- Fixed hidden chats sometimes showing up in chats list.
- Fixed unread badge appearing for hidden chats in the Chats tab bar item.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.9.X
- Fixed call confirm alert not showing in chats.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.7.X
- Fixed a crash when downloading videos from Statuses.
- Fixed 'Move Viewed Statuses to Bottom' not starting from the correct status due to a recent WhatsApp change in how the first unseen status is determined, requiring a patch to override WhatsApp's selection logic with the correct unseen position.
- Fixed an issue where the message reaction date was not displayed.
- Fixed an issue where the Unsaved/Contacts chat list filter was not working properly.
- Fixed white/dark media share sheet style not showing from the chats.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.5.X
- Fixed Status Contacts Groups not updating properly on selection.
- Fixed deleted statuses icon and date not showing in the status header.
- Fixed hidden chats call button showing again

This update contains the following changes:

- Hide 'Allow Contacts Access' banner from the chats list on linked devices.
- Fixed official WhatsApp status always showing in Watusi's statuses bar.

privacy.NSSiriUsageDescription: This lets you use Siri to quickly send and read messages and make calls.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you make video calls, take photos, and record videos.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to authenticate on WhatsApp.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Upload your contacts to WhatsApp's servers to help you quickly get in touch with your friends and help us provide a better experience.
privacy.NSLocationUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This lets you create events on your calendar.
privacy.NSRemindersUsageDescription: This lets you set reminders to call your friends back.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you make calls, send voice messages, and record videos with sound.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This will let you use WhatsApp to place and receive calls through devices that are on the same Wi-Fi or local access networks.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you send photos and videos from your library and save the ones you capture.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. This also lets you send your current location or a nearby place.
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save photos and videos to your library.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: WhatsApp does on-device recognition for Voice Messages. In this mode, no voice data is sent to Apple despite this alert, which is unexpected. Select "Don't Allow" and report to WhatsApp.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. If you only allow access while using the app, you can only send your current location or a nearby place.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: WhatsApp does on-device recognition for Voice Messages. In this mode, no voice data is sent to Apple despite this alert, which is unexpected. Select "Don't Allow" and report to WhatsApp.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. If you only allow access while using the app, you can only send your current location or a nearby place.

apps.name: iCube
apps.subtitle: GameCube & Wii Emulator for iOS & tvOS
apps.localizedDescription:
Experience classic Nintendo GameCube and Wii games on your iOS devices and Apple TV. Built on the proven Dolphin emulator foundation.

Features:
• Full GameCube and Wii emulation
• Controller support (MFi, PlayStation, Xbox)
• Save states and real-time saves
• High-resolution rendering
• Fast-forward and slow motion
• Customizable controls
• Game library management
• And much more!

iCube is a fork of DolphiniOS, optimized for iOS and tvOS devices.

apps.name: Regram (No Plugins)
apps.subtitle: The all-in-one tweak for Instagram
apps.localizedDescription:
This is an original version, it has original Instagram bundle ID. You need to delete original Instagram before installing. It has Plugins/Extensions removed so it can be signed with free Apple IDs.

Regram is your all-in-one tweak for Instagram. Currently in beta and available only to Patreon subscribers.
Activate license by connecting your Patren account from inside Regram Settings.

Access Regram settings by long-pressing on Home tab bar button or from Instagram settings.

versions.localizedDescription:
This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 431.
- Added Image Comment Actions — long-pressing an image comment now offers an Image submenu with Save to Vault, Save to Photos, and Share (Feed > Comments settings).
- Moved Instants out of Messages into its own top-level Settings section.
- Added Auto-Save Instants to Vault — automatically saves every Instant to the Media Vault as Instagram loads it into the viewer (Instants settings).
- Added Browse Saved Instants — open a searchable list of users with saved Instants from the Instants action button or a folder button on the camera header, or jump straight to a single user's saved Instants from their profile action button.
- Instants Upload from Gallery now lets you pick from Photos Library or Media Vault.
- Added Instants Capture Confirmation — shows a confirmation alert when tapping the capture button on the Instants camera so the photo isn't sent immediately (Instants settings).
- Added Hidden Sources in Vault settings — pick which sources to hide from the main Media Vault viewer.
- Added Open Post and Open Profile actions to the Media Vault long-press menu — jump directly to the original Instagram post or user's profile from any saved file.
- Added Custom Note Themes — fully customize the background and text color of your direct notes with a built-in Regram color picker featuring, recent colors, saved favorites. The last theme you used is restored automatically on the next note (Messages > Note Themes settings).
- Added option to hide Join Trending stories — filters out the Add Yours promo that appears between stories in the viewer (Interface Settings).
- Expanded DM Note Actions for GIF notes — long-pressing a GIF note now offers Save GIF to Photos, Save GIF to Vault, Copy GIF Link, and Open GIF Page.
- Fixed follow request accepted/rejected notifications and list cells sometimes showing the user's numeric ID instead of their username.
- Fixed an Unsent Messages Logs crash on launch caused by a Core Data deadlock under burst writes.
- Fixed hiding flag button from chats navigation bar.

This update contains the following changes:

- Fixed manually mark as seen sometimes marking the wrong (previous) chat as seen when sending in another chat.

This update contains the following changes:

- Fixed display of full last active date in direct message chats.
- Fixed issue where excluded chats were not marked as seen in direct messages.

This update contains the following changes:

- Compatibility with IG 424.1
- Fixed an issue where the “Mark as Seen” button flickered in chats.
- Fixed Regram icons not showing in the app icon selector.

This update contains the following changes:

- Many bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 422-424.
- Added an option to change the app icon, including IG teens icons and additional Regram icons (available under the App Utilities section and only with non-duplicate IPAs).
- Added option to lock Regram settings with a passcode, available under App Utilities section.
- Added an option to show a confirmation alert when liking/reacting to DM notes (Messages section).
- Added proper spacing for story actions and seen buttons when an effect button is present.
- Changed the “Hide All Posts” feature to hide only feed posts while keeping the stories bar visible, which can also be hidden separately, so you can now choose to show stories only (Interface Settings).
- Fixed downloading/expanding media from multi-item posts in the reposted section, which now uses a new layout.
- Fixed an issue where the full last active time was not displayed in chats.
- Fixed an issue where the Keep Unsent Messages feature did not prevent messages from being deleted.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 421.
- Added audio download actions (Download Audio & Share, Download Audio to Vault, Copy Audio URL) to Feed, Reels, Stories, and Messages action buttons. Configure from each section's button settings.
- Added Expand Cover support for video Stories, extracting a thumbnail from the video when no cover photo is available. Note: thumbnails can also be downloaded from the download options context menu for ready-to-play files.
- Added 'Download Original' option in DASH quality picker's context menu to download raw video or audio streams without merging or post-processing.
- Added option to convert raw DASH files in Media Vault to a standard playable format, with progress tracking and the choice to replace the original or save as a new file.
- Added option to download profile pictures to Media Vault from the profile action button and from the picture preview viewer.
- Added duplicate download detection that warns before re-downloading media already saved to Photos or Media Vault, with option to skip duplicates in carousels and dimension comparison for different quality versions (General settings).
- Fixed stories auto-advance and mark as seen when tapping like button.
- Fixed profile action button not showing on the profile navigation header.
- Fixed an issue where the stories expand feature was not appearing in the long-press action sheet menu.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 418.
- The crash that happened on 415 for some users was fixed on 417+
- Fixed DM only app on recent IG updates after moving the DM access to tab bar.
- Some changes that should help loading FFmpeg when signed with some signing stores to prevent Merge Failed issues.
- Changed the way Regram marks messages as seen in DMs to a better way.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 415. Currently using IG 414 IPA as we investigate a crash some users reported on 415.
- Introduced a new media player for images, videos, and audio in Downloads and Media Vault. Swipe between items, double-tap to zoom images, and control video playback. Images support text detection and copying on iOS 16+.
- The new media player also supports displaying items downloaded to Photos or Media Vault directly from the download logs.
- Delete with Media option in Downloads now deletes all media associated with the download entry, including items saved to Photos or Media Vault.
- Added confirmation alert when using 'Delete with Media' from Downloads.
- Added option to hide the quicksnap side button from the messages list (Interface settings).
- Added an option to clear the app icon badge count (Support section). Badges will reappear for unread messages after refreshing Direct Messages.
- Fixed the Stories action button’s Download All action crashing when set as the default action.
- Fixed stories mentions sometimes showing double entries in viewers list.
- Fixed sending messages seen receipts in chats when reacting to a message.
- Fixed the feed header button not showing on launch.
- Fixed the Reels auto-advance feature.
- Fixed hiding flag button from chats navigation bar.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 413.
- Introduced Regram’s in-app Media Vault to securely store downloaded media with passcode protection.
- Organize media into folders, filter by type/source/user, and mark favorites.
- New Download to Vault actions are available in all action buttons (configure your action buttons to add them).
- Media Vault can be accessed from the main feed header button, action buttons, or Regram settings.
- Audio downloads will now be included in the download manager and supports saving to media vault.
- Tapping a completed download now opens the saved media in-app (new downloads only).
- Added a Delete with Media option to remove the download log and delete the media from its destination (Photos library or in-app vault).
- Fixed an extra audio download item appearing when downloading DASH-based videos with the default video quality set to High.
- Using Download All on non-multi-item posts now falls back to the regular download action.
- Added an option to show a confirmation alert when creating a group chat from the Share Sheet after selecting multiple users.
- Fixed the Hide Chats toggle when long-pressing the Chats list header.
- Fixed marking stories as seen crashing.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Instagram uses your device's camera to do things like help you take photos, record videos and use effects.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Enable Face ID for quick and secure authentication on Instagram.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Instagram will use your contacts to suggest people and things you care about, and offer a better service. Your contacts will be periodically synced and securely stored on Instagram’s servers.
privacy.NSLocationUsageDescription: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This will let Instagram sync events to your calendar.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Instagram uses your device's microphone to do things like help you record videos and preview audio effects.
privacy.NSFocusStatusUsageDescription: This allows Instagram to check to see if you’ve been missing notifications from friends. You can always change this later in settings.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Instagram uses access to your camera roll to do things like help you share photos and videos to Instagram, apply effects and suggest photos and videos to share.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This allows Instagram to provide you with a better ads experience.
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This allows your phone to find and connect to the glasses using a Bluetooth connection.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save photos and videos to your Camera Roll.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.

- Fixed an issue where the full last active time was not displayed in chats.
- Fixed an issue where the Keep Unsent Messages feature did not prevent messages from being deleted.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 421.
- Added audio download actions (Download Audio & Share, Download Audio to Vault, Copy Audio URL) to Feed, Reels, Stories, and Messages action buttons. Configure from each section's button settings.
- Added Expand Cover support for video Stories, extracting a thumbnail from the video when no cover photo is available. Note: thumbnails can also be downloaded from the download options context menu for ready-to-play files.
- Added 'Download Original' option in DASH quality picker's context menu to download raw video or audio streams without merging or post-processing.
- Added option to convert raw DASH files in Media Vault to a standard playable format, with progress tracking and the choice to replace the original or save as a new file.
- Added option to download profile pictures to Media Vault from the profile action button and from the picture preview viewer.
- Added duplicate download detection that warns before re-downloading media already saved to Photos or Media Vault, with option to skip duplicates in carousels and dimension comparison for different quality versions (General settings).
- Fixed stories auto-advance and mark as seen when tapping like button.
- Fixed profile action button not showing on the profile navigation header.
- Fixed an issue where the stories expand feature was not appearing in the long-press action sheet menu.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 418.
- The crash that happened on 415 for some users was fixed on 417+
- Fixed DM only app on recent IG updates after moving the DM access to tab bar.
- Some changes that should help loading FFmpeg when signed with some signing stores to prevent Merge Failed issues.
- Changed the way Regram marks messages as seen in DMs to a better way.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 415. Currently using IG 414 IPA as we investigate a crash some users reported on 415.
- Introduced a new media player for images, videos, and audio in Downloads and Media Vault. Swipe between items, double-tap to zoom images, and control video playback. Images support text detection and copying on iOS 16+.
- The new media player also supports displaying items downloaded to Photos or Media Vault directly from the download logs.
- Delete with Media option in Downloads now deletes all media associated with the download entry, including items saved to Photos or Media Vault.
- Added confirmation alert when using 'Delete with Media' from Downloads.
- Added option to hide the quicksnap side button from the messages list (Interface settings).
- Added an option to clear the app icon badge count (Support section). Badges will reappear for unread messages after refreshing Direct Messages.
- Fixed the Stories action button’s Download All action crashing when set as the default action.
- Fixed stories mentions sometimes showing double entries in viewers list.
- Fixed sending messages seen receipts in chats when reacting to a message.
- Fixed the feed header button not showing on launch.
- Fixed the Reels auto-advance feature.
- Fixed hiding flag button from chats navigation bar.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 413.
- Introduced Regram’s in-app Media Vault to securely store downloaded media with passcode protection.
- Organize media into folders, filter by type/source/user, and mark favorites.
- New Download to Vault actions are available in all action buttons (configure your action buttons to add them).
- Media Vault can be accessed from the main feed header button, action buttons, or Regram settings.
- Audio downloads will now be included in the download manager and supports saving to media vault.
- Tapping a completed download now opens the saved media in-app (new downloads only).
- Added a Delete with Media option to remove the download log and delete the media from its destination (Photos library or in-app vault).
- Fixed an extra audio download item appearing when downloading DASH-based videos with the default video quality set to High.
- Using Download All on non-multi-item posts now falls back to the regular download action.
- Added an option to show a confirmation alert when creating a group chat from the Share Sheet after selecting multiple users.
- Fixed the Hide Chats toggle when long-pressing the Chats list header.
- Fixed marking stories as seen crashing.

apps.name: AltStore
apps.subtitle: An alternative App Store for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription:
AltStore is an alternative app store for non-jailbroken devices. 

This beta release of AltStore adds support for 3rd party sources, allowing you to download apps from other developers directly through AltStore.

versions.localizedDescription:
NEW

On-Device Sideloading
• Supports sideloading apps without AltServer
• Install, refresh, and (de-)activate apps from anywhere with a WiFi connection
• For complete instructions, check out https://altstore.io/altserverless
• Thanks @jkcoxson and the SideStore team for making this possible!

Liquid Glass UI
• Updated design to fit at home on iOS 26

FIXED
• Fixed unreadable text in light mode for some news alerts (thanks @partyknightsdev!)

NEW
• Supports sideloading apps with “Increased Memory Limit” entitlement
• Supports localized titles, subtitles, and descriptions in sources
• Added `altstore-classic://` URL scheme
• Added Bluesky social media button to Settings

IMPROVED

FIXED
• Fixed choosing alternate app icon on iPad
• Fixed “Join Patreon” sheet appearance in dark mode

• Fixed handling source deep link when already viewing source details
• Fixed redundant app update appearing after resigning expired app
• Fixed not immediately showing updates for some installed apps 
• Fixed not showing OPEN for installed apps when previewing source via deep link
• Fixed not showing OPEN for installed apps when previewing already-added Recommended Source

• Fixed runtime crashes with AltStore 2.0.1
• Fixed "Handshake Failed" error when signing-in

PREVIOUS UPDATE
• Added dark mode & tinted app icons
• Added Home Screen quick actions with support info
• Fixed crash when fetching source containing app larger than 2GB
• Fixed handling Patreon rate limit errors
• Fixed crash updating apps if more than 1 update is available

AltStore 2.0 will unlock third-party sources for everyone, allowing anyone to distribute their apps with AltStore.

apps.name: UTM
apps.subtitle: Virtual machines for iOS (with JIT support)
apps.localizedDescription:
UTM is a full featured virtual machine host for iOS. In short, it allows you to run Windows, Android, and more on your iPhone and iPad.
This version requires using AltJIT. Install UTM SE for slower emulation without JIT.


More information at https://getutm.app/

Features:

• Emulate any Processor
30+ processors supported by qemu including x86_64, ARM64, and RISC-V
• Run any Operating System
Windows, Linux, and more natively and securely on iOS within an App
• Fast Emulation
Para-virtualization with SPICE and JIT compilation with TCG
• High Compatibility
iOS 14+ supported. Works on iPhone and iPad. No jailbreak needed
• Free and Open Source
UTM and its dependencies are all free and open source
• Easy to Use
Configure and customize your VM in a native UI

versions.localizedDescription:
## Highlights
* **QEMU v10.0.2**: The backend has been updated to the latest upstream QEMU which brings with it a variety of bug fixes and performance improvements.
* **Liquid Glass**: UTM adopts the Liquid Glass design on *OS 26.
* **App Intents**: New support for automation with Shortcuts.
* **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Define custom key combinations (such as Ctrl+Alt+Del) that can be sent to the VM from the new Keyboard menu.
* **Improved Wizard**: Simplify the creation of emulated machines by selecting from a list of well-supported configurations. The updated wizard can create more working configurations such as RISC-V64 Ubuntu, classic Mac OS 8.x/9.x, and Windows 95/98.

## Changes (v4.7.5)
* Fixed some rare conditions that could lead to a VM fail to start and spin infinitely
* Fixed some rare crashes that can happen after a VM stops
* Fixed parsing of file paths with commas in the name (thanks @nikolan123)
* ANGLE: Fixed a memory leak issue in the GLES backend (#7546) (thanks @cnnn)
* ANGLE: Fixed a memory leak issue in the Metal backend (#4958)
* Localization: Updated Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified) (thanks @changanmoon)
* (macOS) Fixed App Intents on macOS 26 (#7412) (thanks @peterneutron)
* (macOS) Fixed an error when file locking is disabled and a removable drive with no image selected is started (#7527)
* (macOS) AVF: Fixed shared directory disconnecting when window is resized (#7488) (thanks @evan314159)
* Hotfix: (1/3/25) An earlier release of v4.7.5 has an issue that prevented VMs from starting. Make sure you are on build 118.

## Changes (v4.7.4)
* (macOS) Fixed a crash on VM start when a toolbar menu was reinitialized (note v4.7.4 was re-released to address this) (#7408)
* Home: Fixed layout issue with button titles
* (macOS) Fixed a crash when VM exits while USB is active
* (iOS) Support for StikDebug on iOS 26 (non-SE only)

## Changes (v4.7.3)
* Fixed a crash when starting a VM results in a block device error
* Stop button can now be used a second time to force kill a VM if it is unresponsive after stopping for the first time
* libusb: Fixed multiple race conditions that caused crashes when using USB capture
* CocoaSpice: Fixed multiple race conditions that caused crashes during VM start
* Localization: Updated Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified) (thanks @changanmoon)
* (macOS) Scripting: Fixed broken commands due to name collision (#7360)
* (macOS) Fixed crash when exiting full screen (#7377)

## Changes (v4.7.2)
* (macOS) AVF: Fixed a crash when starting any Apple Virtualization VM (#7355) (We are re-releasing v4.7.2 with build 112 due to this critical bug.)
* Home: Display network details and active IP addresses on the home details screen (thanks @gabefair)
* Home: Show a security warning message when importing a .utm with custom arguments (#6252)
* Config: Option to reset UEFI without pre-loading Secure Boot keys (useful for custom TPM configurations) (#7005)
* Config: Pre-loading Secure Boot keys will now install Microsoft UEFI 2023 certificates (#7257)
* Config: When PS/2 device is enabled, no longer create USB mouse and keyboard devices. This allows older Windows install to work out of the box.
* Config: Quotes in custom arguments are no longer stripped (unless the only quotes wrap the entire argument) (#6343)
* Config: Provide a fixed serial number for VirtIO block devices (#7332)
* QEMU: Fixed an issue which causes Windows 98 to BSoD (#7342)
* QEMU: Do not create a default floppy drive when -nodefaults is used. UTM configuration will set up a FDC device and this is the only way to set up bootindex for floppy.
* Wizard: Legacy Windows configurations will now use PS/2 controller by default
* Wizard: Update OS logos to be consistent with other icons
* Wizard: Windows + i440fx hardware will now instantiate default devices (sound, VGA, networking) that should work with Windows 95/98
* Wizard: Add additional supported hardware configurations for running older Windows
* Wizard: Support floppy boot for Windows configuration
* Scripting: New input automation suite for sending keyboard and mouse input (#6462)
* USB: Fixed a rare crash when initializing the USB devices list (#5811)
* SPICE: Fixed an issue where monitor configuration sent to spice-vdagent contains an invalid size (#5832)
* Localization: Updated Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified) (thanks @changanmoon)
* (iOS) Toolbar: Fix foreground issue on iOS 26 beta 5 and higher
* (macOS) Added ability to auto-connect USB devices on start (#3400)
* (macOS) Fixed connecting USB devices from secondary windows
* (macOS) New "Virtual Machine" menu which mirrors the actions accessible through the toolbar
* (macOS) Keyboard Shortcuts toolbar icon is no longer shown by default (it can be placed on the toolbar through View -> Customize Toolbar). It is also accessible through the "Virtual Machine" menu.
* (macOS) Fixed sending simultaneous mouse button presses (#7068)
* (macOS) utmctl: Add `version` command to detect current UTM version
* (macOS) Settings: New option to disable key swapping on ISO keyboards (#6976)
* (macOS) Settings: New option to randomize network MAC addresses on clone (#7035)

## Changes (v4.7.1)
* New Liquid Glass icon thanks to @forcequitOS
* Added App Intents for VM operations (#6245)
* Added UEFI boot support for RISC-V64 and LoongArch64. This allows Ubuntu for RISC-V64 to work out of the box. (#7183)
* QEMU PPC: Disable `bootindex` when `boot-device` is used in prom-env. This allows Yellow Dog Linux for PPC to work out of the box. (#6436)
* QEMU x86_64: Fixed floppy boot order configuration for other PC models (isapc, i440fx) (#7166)
* QEMU PPC/M68K: Includes classicvirtio drivers to support cursor input without capture and directory sharing (#6520)
* QEMU M68K: Fixed virtio drive config (#7008)
* Fixed a rare crash after stopping VM due to a race condition in libusb
* Home: improve screenshot contrast in Dark Mode (#6894)
* Config: Fixed a crash when trying to enter a large size value when creating a new drive (#7295)
* Config: Corrected the default host IP address in port forwarding config to "0.0.0.0" when it incorrectly displayed "127.0.0.1" (#7132)
* Keyboard Shortcuts: Create custom combinations of keyboard shortcuts from either Settings -> Input or via the Keyboard icon in the VM (press and hold on iOS/visionOS). This will allow you to easily send key commands such as Ctrl+Alt+Del or Stop+A to the VM. (#5698, #6310, #6757)
* Wizard: New option to import an existing drive image when setting up a Linux VM. This allows Ubuntu for RISC-V64 to work out of the box. (#7183)
* Wizard: New option to create a serial port only Linux VM. This allows Ubuntu for RISC-V64 to work out of the box. (#7183)
* Wizard: Removed VHDX import option because Microsoft now provides ARM64 ISO images. Note: You can still create manually import an VHDX after creating a new VM.
* Wizard: New template to create classic Mac OS VMs for M68K and PPC (#3504, #6890)
* Wizard: Most common and supported machines for emulation are now listed prominently with the full list of supported QEMU architectures/targets hidden behind an "Expert" mode. This is necessary because most of the QEMU targets are not properly supported by the wizard anyways and does not generate a bootable config. They usually require a lot more manual tinkering. The page order of the wizard is also tweaked so the hardware config comes before the boot config now.
* Localization: Updated Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified) (thanks @changanmoon)
* (iOS SE) Fixed a crash when launching ArchLinux due to mis-handling of REV32
* (iOS SE) Fixed a crash when the first instruction executed is a goto
* (iOS SE) Removed ARM32, RISC-V32, and added M68K. There is little use for ARM32 and RISC-V32 as they cannot boot anything useful that cannot also be booted by the 64-bit variant (which is still included). If you have a counter example of this, please open an issue on GitHub and we can consider re-adding it back in the future. However, removing these will make the app size a lot smaller. M68K is added to support classic Mac OS.
* (macOS 11) Fixed guest tools mounting (#7297)
* (macOS 11) Fixed stop button not working (#7298)
* (macOS) Fixed a bug where an error message on startup leads to the window being stuck (#7161)
* (macOS) Settings: New setting to disable file locking so VMs can be launched from a network share or a filesystem that does not support locking (#7211)
* (macOS) Settings: New setting to disable screenshots completely for privacy reasons (#6620)
* (macOS) Settings: New setting to swap Ctrl and Cmd keys in VMs (#4003)
* (macOS 26) Settings: Brand new layout with a sidebar to match other native apps
* (macOS) AVF: Added clearer message when trying to install macOS beta without having the latest beta support tools installed
* (macOS) AVF: New option to resize (expand) disk images (#6891)
* (macOS 26) Fixed a layout issue with the resize image popover
* (macOS) Home: Fixed hide sidebar button
* (macOS) Config: Show localized network adapter names when available (#7287) (thanks @Schamper)
* (macOS) Scripting: Fixed an issue where wrong UUIDs were generated for display configs (#7145)

## Changes (v4.7.0)
* Updated to QEMU v10.0.2
* Config: In the RAM slider, the maximum value has been increased to 64GiB (note that you can always go above the slider limit by typing in the text box) (#7234)
* Localization: Updated Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified) (thanks @changanmoon)
* Wizard: Fixed crash when VM name is empty (#7245)
* (iOS) Toolbar: Refactored toolbar button layout code
* (macOS) Host only networks: you can set up multiple host-only networks (including ones shared by VMware) and have multiple VMs on the same virtual network (thanks @Schamper)
* (macOS) utmctl: added option to boot Apple VMs into recovery mode (thanks @cees-elzinga)
* (macOS) ~~Enable QEMU support for vmapple (#7150)~~ Machine model is removed for stability reasons but `apple-gfx-pci` is still supported for Intel VMs
* (macOS) Rename the main window to 'UTM Library' (#7264)
* (macOS) Display an error when IPSW install fails to load the file (instead of crashing) (#6855)
* (macOS) Settings: Fixed a layout issue (#7117)
* (macOS) Apple Virtualization: Add support for ASIF drive images. On macOS 26, ASIF drives will be created by default.

## Issues
Please check the full list on [Github](https://github.com/utmapp/UTM/issues) and help report any bug you find that is not listed.

## Installation

* [iOS](https://docs.getutm.app/installation/ios/)
* [macOS](https://docs.getutm.app/installation/macos/)

| File | Description | Installation | JIT | Hypervisor | USB |
|------|------------|--------------|-----|-----------|-----|
| UTM.deb | Jailbroken iOS version | Open in Cydia, dpkg, or Sileo | Yes | Yes(1) | Yes |
| UTM.dmg | macOS version | Mounting and copying UTM.app to /Applications | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| UTM.ipa | Non-jailbroken iOS version (sideloading) | AltStore, etc (see guide) | Yes(2) | No | No |
| UTM-HV.ipa | Non-jailbroken iOS version (TrollStore) | TrollStore | Yes | Yes(1) | Yes |
| UTM-SE.ipa | Non-jailbroken iOS version (sideloading) | AltStore, enterprise signing, etc | No | No | No |
| UTM-Remote.ipa | Remote client | Any | No | No | No |

1. Hypervisor on iOS requires an M1 iPad or newer.
2. Enabling JIT may require a separate JIT enabler such as [Jitterbug][2] or Jitstreamer.

[1]: https://getutm.app/install/
[2]: https://github.com/osy/Jitterbug

apps.name: UTM SE
apps.subtitle: Virtual machines for iOS (without JIT support)
apps.localizedDescription:
UTM is a full featured virtual machine host for iOS. In short, it allows you to run Windows, Android, and more on your iPhone and iPad.
This version runs on all iOS 14+ devices but lacks JIT support and is slower than regular UTM.


More information at https://getutm.app/

Features:

• Emulate any Processor
30+ processors supported by qemu including x86_64, ARM64, and RISC-V
• Run any Operating System
Windows, Linux, and more natively and securely on iOS within an App
• Fast Emulation
Para-virtualization with SPICE and JIT compilation with TCG
• High Compatibility
iOS 14+ supported. Works on iPhone and iPad. No jailbreak needed
• Free and Open Source
UTM and its dependencies are all free and open source
• Easy to Use
Configure and customize your VM in a native UI

versions.localizedDescription:
## Highlights
* **QEMU v10.0.2**: The backend has been updated to the latest upstream QEMU which brings with it a variety of bug fixes and performance improvements.
* **Liquid Glass**: UTM adopts the Liquid Glass design on *OS 26.
* **App Intents**: New support for automation with Shortcuts.
* **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Define custom key combinations (such as Ctrl+Alt+Del) that can be sent to the VM from the new Keyboard menu.
* **Improved Wizard**: Simplify the creation of emulated machines by selecting from a list of well-supported configurations. The updated wizard can create more working configurations such as RISC-V64 Ubuntu, classic Mac OS 8.x/9.x, and Windows 95/98.

## Changes (v4.7.5)
* Fixed some rare conditions that could lead to a VM fail to start and spin infinitely
* Fixed some rare crashes that can happen after a VM stops
* Fixed parsing of file paths with commas in the name (thanks @nikolan123)
* ANGLE: Fixed a memory leak issue in the GLES backend (#7546) (thanks @cnnn)
* ANGLE: Fixed a memory leak issue in the Metal backend (#4958)
* Localization: Updated Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified) (thanks @changanmoon)
* (macOS) Fixed App Intents on macOS 26 (#7412) (thanks @peterneutron)
* (macOS) Fixed an error when file locking is disabled and a removable drive with no image selected is started (#7527)
* (macOS) AVF: Fixed shared directory disconnecting when window is resized (#7488) (thanks @evan314159)
* Hotfix: (1/3/25) An earlier release of v4.7.5 has an issue that prevented VMs from starting. Make sure you are on build 118.

## Changes (v4.7.4)
* (macOS) Fixed a crash on VM start when a toolbar menu was reinitialized (note v4.7.4 was re-released to address this) (#7408)
* Home: Fixed layout issue with button titles
* (macOS) Fixed a crash when VM exits while USB is active
* (iOS) Support for StikDebug on iOS 26 (non-SE only)

## Changes (v4.7.3)
* Fixed a crash when starting a VM results in a block device error
* Stop button can now be used a second time to force kill a VM if it is unresponsive after stopping for the first time
* libusb: Fixed multiple race conditions that caused crashes when using USB capture
* CocoaSpice: Fixed multiple race conditions that caused crashes during VM start
* Localization: Updated Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified) (thanks @changanmoon)
* (macOS) Scripting: Fixed broken commands due to name collision (#7360)
* (macOS) Fixed crash when exiting full screen (#7377)

## Changes (v4.7.2)

* Home: Display network details and active IP addresses on the home details screen (thanks @gabefair)
* Home: Show a security warning message when importing a .utm with custom arguments (#6252)
* Config: Option to reset UEFI without pre-loading Secure Boot keys (useful for custom TPM configurations) (#7005)
* Config: Pre-loading Secure Boot keys will now install Microsoft UEFI 2023 certificates (#7257)
* Config: When PS/2 device is enabled, no longer create USB mouse and keyboard devices. This allows older Windows install to work out of the box.

There is little use for ARM32 and RISC-V32 as they cannot boot anything useful that cannot also be booted by the 64-bit variant (which is still included). If you have a counter example of this, please open an issue on GitHub and we can consider re-adding it back in the future. However, removing these will make the app size a lot smaller. M68K is added to support classic Mac OS.

apps.name: VCMI
apps.subtitle: Heroes of Might & Magic III engine
apps.localizedDescription:
VCMI is a open source cross-platform HoMM3 engine written from scratch. 

You need data copied from original game to play. 
Follow instructions from https://wiki.vcmi.eu/Installation_on_iOS

apps.name: PokeMMO
apps.localizedDescription: PokeMMO is a free to play mmorpg, come join a growing community as you level up and discover new monsters. Available now on PC, Android, iOS, Mac, and Linux.

apps.name: iTorrent
apps.subtitle: Torrent client for iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
iTorrent officially in the AltStore!

It is an ordinary torrent client for iOS with Files app support and much more.

What can this app do:

• Download in the background
• Live Activity and Dynamic Island progress bar
• Downloading on external drives
• Sequential download (use VLC to watch films while loading)
• Add torrent files from Share menu (Safari and other apps)
• Add magnet links directly from Safari
• Store files in Files app
• File sharing directly from app
• Download torrent by url
• Download torrent by magnet
• Show progress in Dynamic Island
• Send notification on torrent downloaded
• Web/WebDav Server
• Select files download priority
• Change UI to dark theme
• Color personalization
• RSS Feed
• ???

versions.localizedDescription: Action buttons styling

## What’s new
* iOS 26 Support, iTorrent fully adopted new Liquid Glass design
* LibTorrent updated to version 2.0.11
* On first launch, app will ask if you'd like to use Cellular connection, instead of disabling it by default
* Added German localization by @soebbing in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/369
* Added Italian localization by @fraucs in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/385
* Added Polish localization by @yaptx in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/391
* Added Spanish localization  by @Deci8BelioS in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/396

## Fixes
* Crash on iOS <18 fixed

## New Contributors
* @soebbing made their first contribution in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/369
* @fraucs made their first contribution in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/385
* @yaptx made their first contribution in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/391

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/compare/v2.0.14-1...v2.1.0-1

## What’s new
* iOS 26 Support, iTorrent fully adopted new Liquid Glass design
* LibTorrent updated to version 2.0.11
* On first launch, app will ask if you'd like to use Cellular connection, instead of disabling it by default
* Added German localization by @soebbing in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/369
* Added Italian localization by @fraucs in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/385
* Added Polish localization by @yaptx in https://github.com/XITRIX/iTorrent/pull/391

apps.name: OldOS
apps.subtitle: OldOS is a testament to the days of iOS 4.
apps.localizedDescription:
OldOS is a testament to the days of yesteryear, showcasing what iOS once was ten years ago. The ethos of the app is to merge the technologies of today with a pixel-perfect recreation of the user experience of the past. The vast majority of apps in OldOS are fully functional — meaning they seamlessly integrate with the data on your phone to deliver a live, emulator-esque experience. What does this mean? Well, you can play your music in iPod, get directions in Maps, surf the web in Safari, view the current weather in Weather, and much more. By the same token, no shortcuts were taken in fully fleshing out the operating system. You can change your background, adjust settings, search apps, et cetera. There are a few apps still not ready for primetime but don't worry, they're coming soon.

With OldOS, you no longer need to worry about securing a legacy iPhone to experience nostalgia — it's available on your daily driver.

Part of the goal with OldOS is to enable anyone to understand how iOS works and demonstrate just how powerful SwiftUI truly is. For that reason, the entire app is open-sourced — enabling developers to learn about, modify, and add to the app. I thought building this over my last six or so months in high school and sharing it with the world would be a fun and productive endeavor.

Special Features:
* 🧑‍💻 Built almost entirely using SwiftUI.
* 🎨 Designed to be as close to pixel-perfect as possible.
* 📱 Fully functional, perhaps even usable as a second OS.
* ❤️ A testament to the work of Apple employees of both the past and the present.
* 🗺️ Fully open source for all to learn, modify, and build on.

versions.localizedDescription:
# IPA V2.0 Build 7

2.0 (7):
- New Weather backend and added performance improvements
- Updated home button 
- Everything else in 2.0 (1) - 2.0 (6)

NOTE: BundleIdentifier changed in this version and automatic updates have been disabled until manual install occurs.

# IPA V2.0 Build 1

2.0 (1):

Where to begin. I think, first and foremost a sorry is in order — college, life, work all got in the way. This update, and my goal with it, is to bring the project back from the dead so to speak. In doing so, the codebase has been retooled and refactored, APIs have been restored, and compilation errors have been resolved. In the same vein, all (or maybe most?) bugs related to changes in iOS/Swift/SwiftUI over the past few years have been resolved. My goal is to put a new foundation in place to begin building on top of again. In other words, 2.0 returns OldOS to how it once was (and improves it perhaps too).

NOTE: BundleIdentifier changed in this version and automatic updates have been disabled until manual install occurs.

apps.name: SpotC++
apps.subtitle: Spotify Ad-Free, and Other QOL Enhancements.
apps.localizedDescription:
EeveeSpotify is a Spotify IOS app tweak that removes ads, removes limited skips, and almost every other premium feature. It even allows you to fetch lyrics from third-party APIs bypassing Spotify's monthly limit! The only main premium feature that does not work is offline downloads, as this is done server-side.

 Sposify is a Spotify IOS app tweak that adds various enhancements to the Spotify IOS application.

apps.name: EhPanda

apps.localizedDescription:
EhPanda is an unofficial app for iOS and iPadOS that allows users to access and explore adult manga and doujinshi from E-Hentai.
With a user-friendly interface, powerful search features, and a vast collection of content, it offers a personalized library and an immersive reading experience.
Note: EhPanda is not affiliated with or endorsed by E-Hentai.

apps.name: DolphiniOS (Public Beta)
apps.subtitle: Test the latest DolphiniOS.
apps.localizedDescription:
DolphiniOS is a port of the popular Dolphin emulator to iOS. Dolphin lets you play your favourite GameCube and Wii software with enhancements like higher resolutions, save states, and more. You can even play all of Nintendo's classics from past consoles through the Wii's Virtual Console library.

Please note that devices with A8 processors and older are not compatible.

versions.localizedDescription:
Beta 4 attempts to fix crashes when using JIT on devices with an A12, A13, A14, or M1 chip running iOS 26.

Beta 3 adds support for emulating Skylander Portal of Power, fixes JIT on some devices running iOS 17 and 18, and fixes random errors with JIT on iOS 26.

Beta 1 adds support for JIT on iOS 26 using StikDebug.
Adds support for emulating Skylander Portal of Power, fixes JIT on some devices running iOS 17 and 18, and fixes random errors with JIT on iOS 26.
Adds support for JIT on iOS 26 using StikDebug.

This is the second public beta build based on the rewritten DolphiniOS code.

iOS 14 is required to run this build.

This is the second public beta build based on the rewritten DolphiniOS code.

iOS 14 is required to run this build.

This is the first build based on the rewritten DolphiniOS code.

iOS 14 is required to run this build.

This update contains the following changes:

- Fixed ubershaders.
- Fixed fastmem crashing on iOS 16 betas.

The next beta build will be based off the rewritten DolphiniOS source code.

apps.name: OrwellVK
apps.subtitle: A subtle shift from the familiar
apps.localizedDescription:
Features:
- Download everything you love: videos, episodes, clips, songs, stories, and even voice messages
- Incognito Mode: Become invisible. Browse posts, read messages, and publish entries without leaving a trace
- Chats: Manage your chats with ease: send voice and video messages, graffiti directly from the gallery. Pretend you're typing
- Simplicity: Intuitive and flexible settings that are easy to personalize
- And More: OrwellVK is not just about settings. It hides even more features for your comfort and privacy

OrwellVK preferences can be found in the VK Settings and Side menu

versions.localizedDescription:
OrwellVK v1.2

- Fixed clips downloading issue
- Fixed custom notch theming
- Improved downloading videos
- Improved downloading voice messages
- Improved per-message marking logic
- Improved logic for marking voice messages and videos as played
- Improved downloading music
 - Improved toast and download progress UI. Now you can also swipe up the toast to hide it
- Optimization for VK on iOS 26

- Huge thanks for 10K OrwellVK users ❤️

apps.name: Clip
apps.subtitle: Manage your clipboard history with ease.
apps.localizedDescription:
Clip is a simple clipboard manager for iOS. 

Unlike other clipboard managers, Clip can continue monitoring your clipboard while in the background. No longer do you need to remember to manually open or share to an app to save your clipboard; just copy and paste as you would normally do, and Clip will have your back.

In addition to background monitoring, Clip also has these features:

• Save text, URLs, and images copied to the clipboard.
• Copy, delete, or share any clippings saved to Clip.
• Customizable history limit.

Download Clip today, and never worry about losing your clipboard again!

versions.localizedDescription:
iPad Support
• Optimized for larger iPad display
• Supports multiple windows

3rd-Party Keyboard
• Easily paste clippings into any text field
• Switches back to default keyboard automatically after pasting

• Switches to using location services to run in background
• Improves reading clipboard on iOS 17
Initial version 🎉
